risks.message: Board has limited visible fiducial strategy for assembly alignment
risks.recommendation: Add global fiducials to improve assembly registration and inspection consistency.
risks.why_it_matters: Consistent fiducial strategy helps automated assembly and optical alignment stay reliable.
risks.trigger_condition: Visible fiducial count fell below the configured assembly threshold.

fix_suggestion.fix: Add global fiducials to improve assembly registration and inspection consistency.

risks.message: Ground test-point coverage appears limited for bring-up and probing
risks.recommendation: Add at least one accessible ground test point so probing and scope reference setup are easier during bring-up.
risks.why_it_matters: Ground test points are foundational for repeatable probing, debug, and validation.
risks.trigger_condition: Visible ground test-point count fell below the configured minimum.

fix_suggestion.fix: Add at least one accessible ground test point so probing and scope reference setup are easier during bring-up.

risks.message: Critical or debug-oriented net CTRL has no visible test point
risks.recommendation: Expose this net through a test point, header, or accessible debug pad to improve bring-up and manufacturing test coverage.
risks.why_it_matters: Critical nets that cannot be probed easily make validation, factory test, and field debug slower and more expensive.
risks.trigger_condition: A critical or debug-oriented net was identified without any visible test-point component.
risks.threshold_label: Expected at least one visible access point on critical nets

fix_suggestion.fix: Expose this net through a test point, header, or accessible debug pad to improve bring-up and manufacturing test coverage.

risks.message: U2 (mcu) has no nearby decoupling capacitor
risks.recommendation: Place a decoupling capacitor close to the device power pin and on the relevant supply net.
risks.trigger_condition: Nearest valid decoupling capacitor exceeded the configured decoupling distance threshold.
risks.observed_label: Observed nearest capacitor distance: none found

explanation.root_cause: Power delivery path impedance or placement issue

fix_suggestion.fix: Place a 0.1uF decoupling capacitor close to the IC power pin, ideally within the configured threshold of 4.0.

risks.message: Switching or power net VIN forms a long exposed loop path
risks.recommendation: Tighten the converter current loop, shorten the route, and keep the return path adjacent to reduce loop area and EMI.
risks.why_it_matters: Large current loops increase magnetic field radiation and make noisy power stages harder to contain.
risks.trigger_condition: A switching or power-oriented net exceeded the configured loop-length threshold.

fix_suggestion.fix: Tighten the converter current loop, shorten the route, and keep the return path adjacent to reduce loop area and EMI.

risks.message: Net GND uses a trace width below the fab-oriented limit (0.12)
risks.recommendation: Increase the trace width or confirm that the chosen board house can reliably build this geometry.
risks.why_it_matters: Very narrow traces can reduce yield margin, increase fabrication cost, or violate shop minimums.
risks.trigger_condition: Trace width fell below the configured manufacturability threshold.

explanation.impact: Reduced yield or board failure risk

fix_suggestion.fix: Review the board against fabrication limits and increase trace widths or spacing where necessary.

risks.message: Net CTRL uses a trace width below the fab-oriented limit (0.10)
risks.recommendation: Increase the trace width or confirm that the chosen board house can reliably build this geometry.
risks.why_it_matters: Very narrow traces can reduce yield margin, increase fabrication cost, or violate shop minimums.
risks.trigger_condition: Trace width fell below the configured manufacturability threshold.

explanation.impact: Reduced yield or board failure risk

fix_suggestion.fix: Review the board against fabrication limits and increase trace widths or spacing where necessary.

risks.message: U2 may have poor power delivery because nearest regulator U1 is 85.00 units away
risks.recommendation: Move the regulator closer to the load or improve the power delivery path with lower-impedance routing.
risks.trigger_condition: Load-to-regulator distance exceeded the configured power-distribution threshold.

explanation.root_cause: Power delivery path impedance or placement issue

fix_suggestion.fix: Move the regulator closer to the load or reduce the power path length from its current distance of 85.0. Also consider wider copper or a lower-impedance distribution path.

risks.message: High-current net VIN uses a long routed path
risks.recommendation: Shorten the power path and tighten the source-to-load loop to reduce parasitic resistance and inductance.
risks.why_it_matters: Longer high-current routes add drop, loop inductance, and dynamic noise in power delivery paths.
risks.trigger_condition: A high-current net exceeded the configured maximum routed-length threshold.

explanation.root_cause: Power delivery path impedance or placement issue

fix_suggestion.fix: Improve regulator-to-load placement, shorten power paths, widen traces, and reduce unnecessary vias.

risks.message: High-current net VIN uses many vias (7)
risks.recommendation: Reduce via count or use stronger parallel current return paths on this power route.
risks.why_it_matters: Excessive vias in high-current paths can increase resistance, heat, and transient impedance.
risks.trigger_condition: A high-current net exceeded the configured via-count limit.

explanation.root_cause: Power delivery path impedance or placement issue

fix_suggestion.fix: Improve regulator-to-load placement, shorten power paths, widen traces, and reduce unnecessary vias.

risks.message: Regulator or converter U1 lacks a nearby shared capacitor network
risks.recommendation: Move input or output capacitors closer to the converter power pins so current loops stay compact.
risks.why_it_matters: Converters rely on tight capacitor placement to keep di/dt loops small and power noise under control.
risks.trigger_condition: A regulator-like component had no nearby shared capacitor inside the configured converter-cap radius.

explanation.root_cause: Power delivery path impedance or placement issue

fix_suggestion.fix: Improve regulator-to-load placement, shorten power paths, widen traces, and reduce unnecessary vias.

risks.message: Power net VIN has excessive routed length (85.00 units)
risks.recommendation: Reduce power path length or improve distribution topology to lower impedance and voltage drop risk.
risks.trigger_condition: Power-net routed length exceeded the configured maximum length threshold.

explanation.root_cause: Power delivery path impedance or placement issue

fix_suggestion.fix: Shorten the power route and improve placement to reduce the current routed length of 85.0.

risks.message: Power net VIN uses a narrow trace width (0.15)
risks.recommendation: Increase power trace width to reduce resistance, heating, and voltage drop.
risks.trigger_condition: Power trace width fell below the configured minimum width threshold.

explanation.root_cause: Power delivery path impedance or placement issue

fix_suggestion.fix: Increase the power trace width from 0.15 to at least 0.5 or more, depending on current demand.

risks.message: Power net VIN uses many vias (7) which may increase impedance
risks.recommendation: Reduce unnecessary via transitions on critical power nets where possible.
risks.trigger_condition: Power-net via count exceeded the configured maximum via threshold.

explanation.root_cause: Power delivery path impedance or placement issue

fix_suggestion.fix: Reduce via transitions on this power net. It currently uses 7 vias versus a threshold of 5.

risks.message: Ground strategy looks light on stitching support for net GND (0 vias)
risks.recommendation: Add more stitching or reference vias to strengthen grounding continuity and return-current robustness.
risks.why_it_matters: Weak ground stitching can reduce return-path quality and board robustness outside ideal lab conditions.
risks.trigger_condition: Ground via count fell below the configured minimum stitching threshold for a multi-layer board.

fix_suggestion.fix: Add more stitching or reference vias to strengthen grounding continuity and return-current robustness.

risks.message: Ground net GND has limited visible connectivity (2 connections)
risks.recommendation: Review grounding strategy and ensure intended loads and returns are visibly tied into the board ground structure.
risks.why_it_matters: Insufficient ground connectivity can increase susceptibility to EMI, transient issues, and inconsistent field behavior.
risks.trigger_condition: Ground connectivity count fell below the configured reliability threshold.

fix_suggestion.fix: Review grounding strategy and ensure intended loads and returns are visibly tied into the board ground structure.

risks.message: U1 appears to have limited nearby thermal via support (0)
risks.recommendation: Add thermal vias or improve heat escape near this power-dissipating component.
risks.why_it_matters: Power-dissipating parts often need nearby thermal vias to move heat into more copper area or additional layers.
risks.trigger_condition: Nearby thermal-via count fell below the configured heat-exit support threshold.

explanation.root_cause: Thermal concentration or poor heat spreading
explanation.impact: Hotspots, reduced reliability, or thermal stress

fix_suggestion.fix: Improve thermal distribution with better spacing, copper spreading, or thermal-aware placement.

risks.message: U1 connects to relatively narrow copper for heat spreading (0.15)
risks.recommendation: Increase local copper width or area around this component to improve heat spreading.
risks.why_it_matters: Narrow connected copper can limit heat spreading and increase hotspot risk around power components.
risks.trigger_condition: Connected copper width fell below the configured thermal spreading threshold.

explanation.root_cause: Thermal concentration or poor heat spreading
explanation.impact: Hotspots, reduced reliability, or thermal stress

fix_suggestion.fix: Improve thermal distribution with better spacing, copper spreading, or thermal-aware placement.

risks.message: Net CTRL contains a very narrow trace (0.10)
risks.recommendation: Review manufacturability limits and increase trace width if the design rules require it.
risks.why_it_matters: Very narrow traces can be harder to manufacture reliably and may reduce yield margin.
suggested_actions: Increase trace width if routing space allows.
Review whether this narrow section is intentional.
risks.trigger_condition: Signal trace width fell below the configured minimum manufacturable width threshold.

explanation.impact: Reduced yield or board failure risk

fix_suggestion.fix: Increase the narrow trace width from 0.1 to at least 0.15, subject to board-space and fabrication constraints.

executive_summary.headline: Board needs focused engineering review
executive_summary.summary: This board shows high design risk. The main risk concentration is in power integrity. The highest-priority issue is U2 may have poor power delivery because nearest regulator U1 is 85.00 units away. The current design snapshot includes 2 components and 3 nets. The board is likely functional at a prototype level, but the highlighted issues should be addressed before stronger production confidence.

top_issues.message: U2 may have poor power delivery because nearest regulator U1 is 85.00 units away
top_issues.recommendation: Move the regulator closer to the load or improve the power delivery path with lower-impedance routing.

top_issues.message: Power net VIN has excessive routed length (85.00 units)
top_issues.recommendation: Reduce power path length or improve distribution topology to lower impedance and voltage drop risk.

top_issues.message: Power net VIN uses a narrow trace width (0.15)
top_issues.recommendation: Increase power trace width to reduce resistance, heating, and voltage drop.
